name: vedichemp
description: Regulated multi-vendor marketplace for hemp, CBD wellness, Ayurveda and medical cannabis in India.

scripts.db:migrate: prisma db push && for f in prisma/migrations/0001_prohibitions prisma/migrations/0002_recall_delete_immutable prisma/migrations/0003_idempotency_keys prisma/migrations/0004_app_snapshot; do psql "${MIGRATE_DATABASE_URL:-$DATABASE_URL}" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "$f/migration.sql"; done
scripts.db:setup: pnpm db:roles && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:verify
